name: @makfly/beacon-sdk-js
description: Lean Beacon transport, manual tracing and server error capture for Next.js and Node.js.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/nextjs.ts ./src/setup.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external '@makfly/*' && bun build ./src/presence.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --external '@makfly/*' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir dist
